goals: Store learning preferences and study patterns for future reference
Search for previously stored learning preferences to personalize assistance
Review all stored memories to verify what information has been saved
Remove outdated or incorrect memories to keep storage relevant

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical first-year law student trying to understand complex legal concepts. Prefers structured learning but gets overwhelmed by dense material.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic legal concepts but is new to tort law specifics. Does not know about mem0 or memory management tools - treats the assistant as a helpful study companion.

end_condition: The student has successfully stored their learning preferences, verified them through search and list operations, and cleaned up any irrelevant memories.
